nodes.name: Every Day 7AM
nodes.notes: Fires every morning at 7am — before Matthew goes to work

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.hasUrgent ? '🔥 HOO — ACTION NEEDED: ' : '📊 HOO Daily — ' }}{{ new Date().toLocaleDateString() }}

_meta.description: Every morning at 7am — emails Matthew a briefing: replies received, follow-ups due, hot leads to call, pipeline stats. Subject line flags urgent days.
_meta.install: Import JSON into n8n. Connect Gmail. Set timezone to America/Chicago. Activate.
